zh.Kingsdown St John, Kent, England, United: 英國英格蘭肯特金斯堂 聖 約翰
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne於1190年出生在英國薩默塞特福洛時，他的父親Thomas FitzBernard III16歲，母親Alice Jarpenville12歲。他於大約1226年與Joan Aguillon在英國英格蘭肯特金斯堂結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1259年在他的家鄉享年69歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne于1190年出生在英国薩默塞特福洛时，他的父亲Thomas FitzBernard III16岁，母亲Alice Jarpenville12岁。他于大约1226年与Joan Aguillon在英国英格兰肯特金斯堂结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1259年在他的家乡享年69岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne was born in 1190, in Frome, Somerset, England, his father, Thomas FitzBernard III, was 16 and his mother, Alice Jarpenville, was 12. He married Joan Aguillon about 1226, in Kingsdown, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1259, in his hometown, at the age of 69, and was buried in England.

fr.Kingsdown St John, Kent, England, United: Kingsdown St John, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne est né en 1190, à Frome, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Thomas FitzBernard III, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Alice Jarpenville, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Joan Aguillon environ 1226, à Kingsdown, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1259, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.Kingsdown St John, Kent, England, United: Kingsdown St John, Kent, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne 1190 in Frome, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas FitzBernard III 16 und seine Mutter Alice Jarpenville 12. Er hat um 1226 in Kingsdown, Kent, England, United Kingdom Joan Aguillon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1259 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne è nato il nel 1190 nel Frome, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Thomas FitzBernard III, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Alice Jarpenville, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Joan Aguillon circa 1226, nel Kingsdown, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1259, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowneが1190年にイギリスソメルセトフロメで生まれた時，父Thomas FitzBernard IIIは16歳，母Alice Jarpenvilleは12歳であった。約1226年にイギリスイギリスケントキングスダウンでJoan Aguillonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1259年に故郷で69歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.Kingsdown St John, Kent, England, United: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 킨그즈다운 스트 존
ko.lifeSummary: Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne(이)가 1190년 영국 서머세트 프롬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas FitzBernard III(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Jarpenville(은)는 12세였다. 그는 대략 1226년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 킨그즈다운에서 Joan Aguillon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1259년 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.Kingsdown St John, Kent, England, United: Kingsdown St John, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne nasceu em 1190, em Frome, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas FitzBernard III, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Alice Jarpenville, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Aguillon aproximadamente 1226, em Kingsdown, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1259, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ro.Kingsdown St John, Kent, England, United: Kingsdown St John, Kent, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.Kingsdown St John, Kent, England, United: кингсдоун ст джон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne родился в 1190 г. в местности фром, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas FitzBernard III было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Jarpenville, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Aguillon около 1226 г. в местности кингсдоун, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1259 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.Kingsdown St John, Kent, England, United: Kingsdown St John, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Ralph Fitzbernard Kingsdowne nació en 1190, en Frome, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas FitzBernard III, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Alice Jarpenville, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Joan Aguillon aproximadamente 1226, en Kingsdown, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1259, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
